name: spark-ssr
description: Zero-config SSR for spark-html on Bun. The HTML template infers everything: filesystem routing, layouts, <spark-ssr> declarative data (SQL, URLs, globs, modules), auto CRUD with validation, guards, no-JS forms, schema + seeds, live updates, SEO. Precompiled render programs + a full-page response cache + streaming: fast by default. No build step.
